name: Astral Nebula
description: This Python tool can be used as exposure calculator which estimates inhaled dose of particulate matter during a soldering session. It requires the user to input the pollutant emission rate, duration of activity, physical distance between source and breathing zone and a ventilation factor. The tool outputs the estimated total inhaled mass and contextualizes this figure by comparing it to the particulate equivalent of a cigaret. Users should interpret the output as a comparative baseline to understand how heavily proximity and localized ventilation influence acute exposure over a short period and not as a precise medical metric.
